Title: E-Commerce & Marketing Automation Specialist (m/w/d)
Description:
Wir suchen derzeit für unseren Kunden, einen modernen, familiengeführten Mittelständler mit über 45-jähriger Firmengeschichte, der Outdoor Equipment und Power Tools entwickelt und vertreibt und seinen Sitz südlich von FFM hat einen
E-Commerce & Marketing Automation Specialist (m/w/d)
Deine Skills:
E-Commerce Schnittstellen & Systeme
Betreuung und Weiterentwicklung der Schnittstellen zwischen ERP-System, Onlineshop (Shopware/Shopify/etc.), Amazon, eBay und weiteren Marktplätzen
Sicherstellung von konsistenten Produkt-, Preis- und Bestandsdaten über alle Kanäle hinweg
Automatisierung der Bestell- und Retourenprozesse zwischen ERP und Marktplätzen
Marketing Technology (MarTech) & Automatisierung
Aufbau und Pflege einer leistungsfähigen Marketing-Tech-Architektur (CRM, E-Mail-Marketing, Tracking, Analytics, Attribution)
Entwicklung und Umsetzung automatisierter Kampagnen über E-Mail, Social Media, Push-Nachrichten und Ads
Nutzung von KI-Agents zur Content-Erstellung (Social Media Posts, Newsletter, Blogartikel, Produkttexte) und deren Verteilung
Implementierung von Customer Journeys, Lead-Nurturing-Flows und Segmentierungen für personalisierte Kundenansprache
Analyse & Optimierung
Aufbau von Dashboards und Reportings zu Performance-Marketing, Marktplatzverkäufen und Customer Journeys
Identifikation von Automatisierungspotenzialen entlang des gesamten E-Commerce-Prozesses
A/B- und Multivariates Testing von Kampagnen zur Conversion-Optimierung
Teamwork & Innovation
Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Marketing, Vertrieb und IT
Beobachtung von Trends im Bereich KI, Automatisierung und E-Commerce-Technologien und Transfer ins Unternehmen
Dein Profil:
Erfahrung in der Marketing Automation (z. B. im besten Falle Brevo, aber auch HubSpot, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Salesforce Marketing Cloud oder ähnliche Tools sind von Vorteil)
Technisches Verständnis von APIs, Schnittstellen und Datenflüssen (z. B. ERP ↔ Shop ↔ Marktplätze)
Kenntnisse im Bereich E-Commerce-Plattformen (Shopware, Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, eBay)
Sicherer Umgang mit Analytics- und Tracking-Tools (Google Analytics 4, Tag Manager, Data Studio / Looker, ggf. Power BI)
Erste Erfahrung im Umgang mit Automatisierungstools (z. B. Zapier, Make, n8n) und KI-Systemen (ChatGPT-Agents, Copilot, Jasper etc.)
Kreativität und ein Auge für zielgruppenorientierte Content-Strategien
Analytisches Denken, strukturierte Arbeitsweise und Lust auf Innovation
Wir freuen uns auf Deine aussagekräftige Bewerbung inkl. Motivationsschreiben, Startdatum und Gehaltsvorstellung.

Title: Digital Marketing Specialist (m/f/d)
Description:
Location: Frankfurt am Main
About Us
AllUnity, a joint venture between DWS, Flow Traders, and Galaxy, is a regulated e-money institute building Europe’s leading digital payments infrastructure and issuing EURAU a fully regulated, euro-denominated stablecoin designed to power digital asset markets and global commerce. With institutional-grade infrastructure and real-time settlement, AllUnity bridges traditional finance and digital assets delivering trusted, borderless payment infrastructure for Europe and global markets.
About the Role
AllUnity is looking for a creative and hands-on Digital Marketing Specialist to join our growing marketing team. In this role, you will drive digital marketing excellence across our campaigns, channels, and platforms, helping us grow brand awareness, engagement, and conversion within the fast-moving world of digital finance.
You’ll be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing performance-driven digital marketing initiatives across web, email, media, SEO, and social. You'll work closely with business development, design, and product teams to ensure our digital presence reflects our vision.
If you are a digital-native marketer who thrives in fast-paced environments, understands the fintech and digital asset landscape, and loves building campaigns that deliver measurable results, we’d love to meet you.
Tasks
Drive Digital Marketing Excellence:
Support the digital marketing initiatives for AllUnity, spanning from go-to-market strategy through the full lifecycle of customer engagement.
Maintain and update the company website; oversee the creation, launch, and ongoing maintenance of the website.
Plan, set up, and execute targeted email marketing campaigns, ensuring alignment with overall marketing goals.
Lead cross-functional collaboration with product, sales, business development, and communications teams to ensure seamless product launches and impactful campaigns.
Proactively identify market opportunities and refine positioning and messaging to resonate with target audiences across Europe and beyond.
Plan and execute multi-channel digital marketing campaigns (web, email, social, paid, SEO) to drive awareness, engagement, and adoption.
Report regularly to the Head of Marketing and leadership on campaign performance and optimization recommendations.
Develop and promote high-quality content and marketing materials (articles, decks, one-pagers, videos) aligned with market trends and regulatory updates in English and in German.
Support planning and execution for AllUnity’s participation in key fintech, blockchain, and regulatory events worldwide. Secure speaking engagements, sponsorships, and strategic partnerships that enhance brand visibility and generate leads.
Organize webinars, roundtables, and partner events to establish AllUnity as a thought leader and trusted industry partner.
Provide regular performance reports and insights to the Head of Marketing and leadership team.
Continuously improve campaigns based on data-driven insights and market feedback.
Requirements
3-4 years of hands-on experience in digital marketing, ideally within the payments, fintech, digital asset, or crypto industry.
Familiarity with blockchain, stablecoins, and digital assets is a strong plus.
Good communication skills, able to influence stakeholders, simplify complex ideas, and inspire action.
Fluent in English and German - German native language skills are a strong plus.
Data-driven mindset with strong proficiency in campaign analytics, web tools (e.g., Google Analytics, HubSpot, SEO platforms), and A/B testing.
A collaborative team player with a  hands-on mentality who thrives in cross-functional environments and is comfortable working independently.
Confidence working with regulatory topics and breaking down technical content into compelling narratives.
Benefits
Shape European Payments: Help build the leading EUR stablecoin and modernize payments across Europe.
Drive Real-World Impact: Make global, 24/7 payments as easy as sending a text, powering both digital assets and traditional commerce.
Be Part of Stablecoin Innovation: Work on MiCAR-compliant, regulated products at the forefront of digital finance.
Grow in a Regulated, High-Growth Market: Join a BaFin-regulated company with credibility and ambitious growth plans.
Collaborate & Make a Difference: Work cross-functionally with industry leaders and ecosystem partners in a fast-paced, supportive team.
Expand Your Expertise: Deepen your skills in payments, stablecoins, and digital marketing while shaping the future of finance.
Benefits
Competitive Compensation
30 Days Paid Vacation
Learning & Development Budget
Regular Team Retreats & Offsites
Transparent Culture and Open Communication
Welcome Packages & Company Swag
Ready to Apply?
If you’re excited to help shape the future of finance, we want to hear from you!
Let’s build something meaningful together!

Title: Trade Marketing Specialist  eCom & Digital Shelf (m/w/d)
Description:
Quote from Hiring Manager
This role is key to bringing our brands to life on the digital shelf and in the e-Commerce environment. Working with a great variety of passionate colleagues from different disciplines in a great team, it guarantees a steep learning curve, offers potential to leave a significant mark and pave the way for further development.
Meaningful Work From Day One
Aligned with Brown-Forman long-term brand building and profit growth strategies, this position helps to optimize the route to new and existing consumers in eCommerce and will indirectly connect with consumers by optimizing the customer approach with special focus on Amazon.
This position’s scope is to positively influence consumer purchase behavior by supporting the Senior Trade Marketing Manager to drive physical and mental availability of our brands in eCommerce.
The role encompasses the responsibility for the full local translation of Brand Strategies into compelling channel strategies for eCom customers with the support of the Senior Trade Marketing Manager.
What You Can Expect
The Trade Marketing Specialist Digital Shelf and eCom is responsible for managing all eCommerce content, including the digital shelf, brand shops and Amazon campaigns. Additionally, the role supports the development and execution of the Amazon Online Retail Media Strategy and the annual set-up of optimal consumer & customer targets for the eCom by brand in collaboration with Brand Marketing, Sales team and other Marketing functions.
This position is responsible for managing and updating the Product Information Management system (PIM) for Germany and maximizes the use of assets from the B-F Global content management system (BAR+) in order to ensure best-in-class content and high quality assets on e-commerce sites and for retail and other external partners.
The Trade Marketing Specialist Digital Shelf & eCom aligns with the Brand Marketing team on paid search campaigns in the relevant eCommerce environment (mainly Amazon), by translating the overall Brand Management strategy into the eCom channel. They support the agency in the strategic planning and evaluation.
Collaboration with the Market Category Consumer Insights (MCCI) team and Sales team to gain more eCom facts, understanding and consequently insights (e.g. via tests, studies, analysis etc.)
Be the key point of contact for internal & external agency collaborations for our Retail Media agency, content production and eCom Digital Shelf tools.
Planning and coordinating the A&P budgets for the respective ecom-projects including online retail media.
What You Bring To The Table
Close collaboration with the German Marketing Team, German Sales Team and international counterparts as well as external agencies to ensure high quality content in accordance with the marketing and sales strategy.
First expertise of project management with a high degree of organization and a good understanding of prioritization and time management
Reliable teamplayer with strong interpersonal communication skills who works in a respectful and inclusive manner
The right mix between dedication and pursuit of excellence and understanding for urgency and problem solving
First agency management experience of Retail Media & Creative Agencies - Global and local
Solid understanding of retail media KPIs and strategic planning, leveraging data and analytics
Fluency in German and strong English capabilities
What Makes You Unique
Education: Undergraduate Degree.
Recent graduates will be considered - or ideally 2+ years working client and/ or agency side in media and marketing disciplines.
Evidence of project management experience within a marketing or communications environment.
Experience in holding project management roles and organizing groups or teams is an important background for this role within or outside the communications field.
Preferred Experience & Education:
Certifications: Broad based business education such as Business Degree or MBA or specific educational qualifications in areas such as information technology.
Experience:
Ideally the candidate will have communications experience gained at a client or agency.
Experience in working in the e-commerce or media related field.
Passion and knowledge for the digital universe from media to eCom shops
Who We Are
We believe great people build great brands. And we know there is Nothing Better in the Market than a career at Brown-Forman. Being a part of Brown-Forman means you will grow both personally and professionally. You will have the opportunity to solve problems, seize opportunities, and generate bold ideas. You will belong to a place where teamwork matters and where you are encouraged to bring your best self to work.
What We Offer
Total Rewards at Brown-Forman is designed to engage our people to ensure sustainable and profitable growth for generations to come. As a premium spirits company, we offer equitable pay structures for individual and company performance alongside a premium employee experience. We offer a range of premium benefits that reflect our company values and meet the needs of our diverse workforce.
\
Brown-Forman Corporation is committed to equality of opportunity in all aspects of employment. It is the policy of Brown-Forman Corporation to provide full and equal employment opportunities to all employees and potential employees without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, veteran status, age, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, genetic information, physical or mental disability or any other legally protected status.
Business Area: Europe, Africa, APAC Division
Function: Trade Marketing
City
Hamburg
State
Country: DEU

Title: Search Specialist  - Düsseldorf (all Gender)
Description:
Digitl ist ein junges und innovatives Unternehmen in den Bereichen Marketing und Cloud-Technologie. In einem kollaborativen und funktionsübergreifenden Umfeld entwickeln wir neue Konzepte, um unsere Kunden aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen in eine digital getriebene Zukunft zu führen. Werde ein Digitl Native und bringe als Search Specialist deine eigenen frischen und zukunftsweisenden Ideen ein, um sie zusammen mit den Experten aus deinem Team oder mit Google als direkten Ansprechpartner umzusetzen.
Die wichtigsten Google-Tools, mit denen du arbeiten wirst, sind Google Ads, Search Ads 360 und in gewissem Umfang auch Campaign Manager 360. Dein Ziel ist es, Kunden auf die nächste Stufe datengesteuerter Kampagnen in Google Ads oder der Google Marketing Platform zu bringen.
Aufgaben
Als Spezialist für Paid Search berätst du Kunden in deinem Fachgebiet und lieferst strategische Empfehlungen und praxisorientierte Erkenntnisse.
Du setzt die Bedürfnisse und Ziele der Kunden in effektive Entwicklungspläne und Strategien um, die ihnen helfen, ihre Geschäftsziele zu erreichen.
Du leitest die Umsetzung von Projekten und führst Kunden in die Google Marketing Platform (GMP) und fortgeschrittene Google Ads-Setups ein.
Du trägst zu Kundenpräsentationen und Case Studies bei und bleibst gleichzeitig über Branchentrends auf dem Laufenden, indem du neue Web Technologien und -strategien recherchierst, um das Wissen des Teams zu erweitern.
Du hilfst bei der Entwicklung unserer AdTech-Dienstleistungen, indem du die Tiefe unseres Dienstleistungsangebots erweiterst und unser Portfolio an digitalen Produkten mit Schwerpunkt auf Google Ads ausbaust.
Qualifikationen
Du hast einen Abschluss mit Schwerpunkt Marketing, E-Commerce, E-Business oder Data Science oder hast eine Ausbildung absolviert (z. B. als Marketing Communications Specialist).
Du bringst 2–3 Jahre Erfahrung im Suchmaschinenmarketing mit und hast einschlägige Erfahrung mit Google Ads und/oder Search Ads 360.
Du hast praktische Erfahrung in der Zusammenarbeit mit oder bei einer Mediaagentur oder in der Zusammenarbeit mit Branchenpartnern.
Du bist versiert in der Analyse von Daten, der Erstellung und Bearbeitung detaillierter Reports.
Du zeichnest dich sowohl durch interne Zusammenarbeit als auch durch Kundeninteraktionen aus und kommunizierst klar und effektiv.
Du bist über die neuesten Branchentrends und Entwicklungen auf dem Laufenden.
Du gehst neue Herausforderungen mit Begeisterung, einer positiven Einstellung und Lernbereitschaft an.
Perks & Benefits
Co-Working: Dir steht ein Platz in den besten Co-Working Spaces in Düsseldorf, Zürich, Barcelona oder Hamburg zur Verfügung.
Remote 1st: Alle unsere Prozesse sind auf dezentrales Arbeiten ausgelegt. Du entscheidest, ob du lieber vom Home Office aus arbeitest oder deinen Tag in einem unserer Büros verbringst.
Home-Office-Ausstattung: Wir stellen dir eine hochwertige Standardausstattung für deine Remote-Arbeitsumgebung zur Verfügung.
Dog Lovers: Wenn du einen Hund hast, bring ihn mit zur Arbeit.
Kompetenzerweiterung: Als hochspezialisierter Technologiepartner unterstützen wir deine Entwicklung mit Zertifizierungen, Konferenzbesuchen und Schulungsmöglichkeiten.

Title: Ad Technology Consultant - Düsseldorf (All Genders)
Description:
Digitl ist ein junges und innovatives Unternehmen in den Bereichen Marketing und Cloud-Technologie. In einem kollaborativen und funktionsübergreifenden Umfeld entwickeln wir neue Konzepte, um unsere Kunden aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen in eine digital getriebene Zukunft zu führen. Werde ein Digitl Native und bringe als AdTech Consultant deine eigenen frischen und zukunftsweisenden Ideen ein, um sie zusammen mit den Experten aus deinem Team oder mit Google als direkten Ansprechpartner umzusetzen.
Als AdTech Consultant besteht deine Aufgabe darin, alle Tools im Zusammenhang mit Advertising Technology (AdTech) zu verstehen und deren Anwendung und Weiterentwicklung hin zu einer vollständig datengesteuerten Media Activation zu begleiten. Die wichtigsten Tools der Google Marketing Platform, mit denen du arbeiten wirst, sind Search Ads 360, Google Ads, Display & Video 360 und Campaign Manager 360.
Aufgaben
Als AdTech Consultant berätst du Kunden in deinem Fachgebiet und lieferst strategische Empfehlungen und praxisorientierte Erkenntnisse.
Du setzt die Bedürfnisse und Ziele der Kunden in effektive Entwicklungspläne und Strategien um, die ihnen helfen, ihre Geschäftsziele zu erreichen.
Du leitest die Umsetzung von Projekten und führst Kunden in die Google Marketing Platform (GMP) ein.
Du wirst bei der Entwicklung unserer AdTech-Dienstleistungen mitwirken, indem du unser Dienstleistungsangebot vertiefst und unser Portfolio an digitalen Produkten erweiterst.
Deine Aufgabe besteht darin, deinen Kunden bei der Entwicklung eines vollständig automatisierten, datengesteuerten Activation Setups zu unterstützen. Um ihnen dabei zu helfen, dieses Ziel zu erreichen, wirst du alle Tools innerhalb und außerhalb des GMP einsetzen.
Über AdTech hinaus erwirbst du auch Fachkenntnisse in verwandten Plattformen und Tools wie Looker Studio, Google Studio, Google Analytics und Google Tag Manager sowie in Bereichen wie Digital Analytics, Cloud und Data Science.
Qualifikationen
Du hast einen Abschluss mit Schwerpunkt Marketing, E-Commerce, E-Business oder Data Science oder hast eine Ausbildung absolviert (z. B. als Marketing Communications Specialist).
Du bringst 2–3 Jahre Erfahrung im Suchmaschinenmarketing mit und hast einschlägige Erfahrung mit Google Ads und/oder Search Ads 360.
Du fühlst dich in Startup-Umgebungen wohl und hast Spaß daran, Dinge von Grund auf aufzubauen.
Du bist versiert in der Analyse von Daten, der Erstellung und Bearbeitung detaillierter Reports.
Du verfolgst einen beratenden Ansatz bei der Kundenentwicklung und der gleichzeitigen Verwaltung mehrerer Projekte.
Du zeichnest dich durch interne Zusammenarbeit mit klarer und effektiver Kommunikation und der Bereitschaft, dein Wissen zu teilen, aus.
Du bist über die neuesten Branchentrends und Entwicklungen auf dem Laufenden.
Du gehst neue Herausforderungen mit Begeisterung, einer positiven Einstellung und Lernbereitschaft an.
Perks & Benefits
Co-Working: Dir steht ein Platz in den besten Co-Working Spaces in Düsseldorf, Zürich, Barcelona oder Hamburg zur Verfügung.
Remote 1st: Alle unsere Prozesse sind auf dezentrales Arbeiten ausgelegt. Du entscheidest, ob du lieber vom Home Office aus arbeitest oder deinen Tag in einem unserer Büros verbringst.
Home-Office-Ausstattung: Wir stellen dir eine hochwertige Standardausstattung für deine Remote-Arbeitsumgebung zur Verfügung.
Dog Lover: Wenn du einen Hund hast, bring ihn mit zur Arbeit.

Du bringst 2–3 Jahre Erfahrung im Suchmaschinenmarketing mit und hast einschlägige Erfahrung mit Google Ads und/oder Search Ads 360.
Du fühlst dich in Startup-Umgebungen wohl und hast Spaß daran, Dinge von Grund auf aufzubauen.
Du bist versiert in der Analyse von Daten, der Erstellung und Bearbeitung detaillierter Reports.
Du verfolgst einen beratenden Ansatz bei der Kundenentwicklung und der gleichzeitigen Verwaltung mehrerer Projekte.
Du zeichnest dich durch interne Zusammenarbeit mit klarer und effektiver Kommunikation und der Bereitschaft, dein Wissen zu teilen, aus.
Du bist über die neuesten Branchentrends und Entwicklungen auf dem Laufenden.
Du gehst neue Herausforderungen mit Begeisterung, einer positiven Einstellung und Lernbereitschaft an.
Perks & Benefits
Co-Working: Dir steht ein Platz in den besten Co-Working Spaces in Düsseldorf, Zürich, Barcelona oder Hamburg zur Verfügung.
Remote 1st: Alle unsere Prozesse sind auf dezentrales Arbeiten ausgelegt. Du entscheidest, ob du lieber vom Home Office aus arbeitest oder deinen Tag in einem unserer Büros verbringst.
Home-Office-Ausstattung: Wir stellen dir eine hochwertige Standardausstattung für deine Remote-Arbeitsumgebung zur Verfügung.
Dog Lover: Wenn du einen Hund hast, bring ihn mit zur Arbeit.
Kompetenzerweiterung: Als hochspezialisierter Technologiepartner unterstützen wir deine Entwicklung mit Zertifizierungen, Konferenzbesuchen und Schulungsmöglichkeiten.

Title: Senior Localisation Specialist Dutch - Marketplace
Description:
About Us
At Booking.com, data drives our decisions. Technology is at our core. And innovation is everywhere. But our company is more than datasets, lines of code or A/B tests. We’re the thrill of the first night in a new place. The excitement of the next morning. The friends you encounter. The journeys you take. The sights you see. And the memories you make. Through our products, partners and people, we make it easier for everyone to experience the world.
About The Team
The Localisation team at Booking.com ensures that the company’s products, content, and customer experiences are tailored to global audiences. They develop and implement localization strategy, manage relationships with translation vendors, set and uphold rigorous quality standards, and collaborate with internal partners like Marketing and Product. The team leverages automation and internal/external expertise to deliver culturally relevant, high-quality translations at scale across multiple languages and regions. Their work enables Booking.com to connect with users worldwide, drive engagement, and support strategic initiatives like the Connected Trip, all while maintaining consistency, accuracy, and effectiveness across diverse markets.
Role Overview
The Senior Localisation Specialist seeks to bring the best user experience to our audience in the Dutch market, one of the company’s key markets, through high quality localisation. The Senior Localisation Specialist will help ensure the localised and transcreated content provided into Dutch to Booking.com and its sister companies is accurate, locally relevant, and adhering to brand and product instructions and requirements as well as internal language assets. This will support the success of global strategic ambitions, new product launches, and various campaigns in the company’s key markets locally.
They are expert in quality and language asset management, as well as translation, localisation, and transcreation. They are advanced users of translation management systems and possess the knowledge and skills required to train and critically assess quality provided by internal and external linguists in Dutch as per the applicable quality framework.
The Senior Localisation Specialist is accountable for ensuring internally applicable quality standards are met and will provide local market insights and localisation consultancy and lead initiatives such as local competitor analysis, user research and experimentation to help identify and act upon opportunities to localize deeper for the local market.
Responsible for creating and maintaining language assets and language training resources, the Senior Localisation Specialist also supports the execution of localisation projects from a quality-process perspective.
They will work with the team and may get involved at any stage of the end-to-end journey from the copy/brief creation of content to the localized copy quality assessment. They have a strong ability to identify areas for improvement and come up with new initiatives to deliver better quality moving forward. Whenever possible, the Senior Localisation Specialist leverages localisation, local market insights and quality performance data, as well as stakeholder and end user feedback to identify areas for improvements. This includes delivering better quality in Dutch and one of the company’s key markets.
They will also collaborate closely with the Quality Management team and support regional and global quality initiatives.
Key Job Responsibilities And Duties
Own and be responsible and accountable for the quality of the translations provided by internal and external linguists in Dutch to ensure the localised content into Dutch is accurate, adapted to the local culture and market. It should also adhere to brand and product instructions and requirements as well as internal language assets. Thus supporting the success of global strategic ambitions in their key market locally;
Create, manage and maintain internal language assets and Dutch language and culture guidelines, including term bases, glossaries, translation memories, style guides to be used by internal and external linguists;
Assess the quality of the copy transcreated as part of key-market campaigns into the local language. May get involved at any stage of the end-to-end journey from the copy/brief creation of content to the localized copy quality assessment.
Perform regular quality assessments of the copy translated by internal and external linguists as per applicable quality framework and driving translated copy improvements based on stakeholder feedback;
Provide quality coaching and training to internal linguists, external vendors and freelancers to maintain and/or improve quality of the content localised into Dutch ;
Monitor quality performance metrics and output of internal and external linguists providing translations into Dutch . Identify and act upon opportunities for improvement identified by performing root cause analysis, quality deep dives, and giving consistent feedback and training to internal and external linguists.;
Ensuring that existing and new quality processes, methodologies, and guidelines are followed and understood by vendor linguists and that applicable quality performance targets are met;
Contribution to the documentation of internal localisation quality processes and knowledge base maintenances, in cooperation with the Quality Manager;
Apply existing market and language knowledge and expertise to provide proactive localisation consultancy to the business to help ensure the localized content is locally relevant to the Dutch market and drive market localisation opportunities collaborating with relevant stakeholders across the company;
Work closely with key stakeholders, also at every stage of the copy/content creation process, as needed by providing local market insights and consultancy;
Lead key market research such as competitor analysis, localisation SWOT analysis, market research and support local language copy AB testing. Apply available market insights, findings and localisation data in daily work to support company and regional localisation strategy in the Dutch market;
Support the Quality Management team, Localisation Program Office and Hub Manager with regional and global quality-related initiatives;
Own checking the quality of the language test, creating training resources for internal and external linguists and sharing regular feedback on their quality as per applicable quality framework during and after external and internal linguists’ hiring;
Cooperate with the Quality Manager and support the development and execution of quality improvement programmes;
Optimizing existing quality processes for Dutch , initiating and implementing new ways to improve the team’s work to support quality;
Proactively sourcing for insights and current trends in the local market and field of localisation quality management and technologies and identifying opportunities to apply gained knowledge within the team and localisation track;
Role Qualifications And Requirements
Bachelor Degree in Language, Translation, or related field
Min. 5 years of experience in the localisation industry
min. 5 years experience in translation, transcreation, audiovisual translation and/or writing localized copy for the Dutch market and or managing the localisation quality of Dutch
Native level Dutch speaker with excellent knowledge of spoken and written English
Experience in QA testing or Linguistic QA management;
Experience in quality management including revision, editing, giving and receiving feedback on translation quality to internal and external linguists
Terminology management for Dutch
Excellent proficiency with at least 1 translation management software
MT post-editing
Analytical skills and ability to interpret available quality and localisation data and market insights to support and maintain quality in Dutch
Excellent communication and networking skills with a strong ability to influence different stakeholders (virtually and in person)
Proactive and initiative taker, both when working independently and in collaboration with a team;
Stakeholder and vendor management
Ability to provide quality coaching and continuous feedback effectively and objectively
Understanding of internationalization, SEO, e-commerce, UX and marketing techniques
Teamwork and ability to cooperate effectively with a local and international global team
Prior experience as a Senior Localisation Specialist, Quality Manager or related roles is a plus
Experience with e-commerce product localisation and marketing and creative content translation and transcreation is a plus
Inclusion at Booking.com:
Take it from our Chief People Officer, Paulo Pisano: “At Booking.com, the diversity of our people doesn’t just create a unique workplace, it also creates a better and more inclusive travel experience for everyone. Inclusion is at the heart of everything we do. It’s a place where you can make your mark and have a real impact in travel and tech.”
Read all about DEI and the Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) at Booking.com here
Total Reward Philosophy:
The benefits and perks offered by the company can be found here.
Career Development Opportunities:
Learn more about Your Career Journey here.
Become a Mentee and benefit from a mentoring relationship with a more experienced person to help you identify and achieve your professional and personal development goals.
Booking.com is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We strive to move well beyond traditional equal opportunity and work to create an environment that allows everyone to thrive.
Pre-Employment Screening
If your application is successful, your personal data may be used for a pre-employment screening check by a third party as permitted by applicable law. Depending on the vacancy and applicable law, a pre-employment screening may include employment history, education and other information (such as media information) that may be necessary for determining your qualifications and suitability for the position.

Title: Sales Specialist

Company Description
At INSIDEA, we are a fully remote organisation, hiring top talents from across the globe to deliver exceptional digital marketing and HubSpot solutions. Title: Field Account Manager Golf

Description:
Wer sind wir?
Die Bauer Immobilienunternehmensgruppe ist ein exklusive Immobilienboutique und ein Full-Service Anbieter für Immobilieninvestments. Angefangen vom exklusiven Off-Market Zugang und Prüfung der Objekte, individuelle Beratung und Konzeption, Finanzierungsberatung und Vermittlung, professionelle Mietverwaltung → Zusammenfassend ein Rundum-sorglos-Paket!
Dabei stehen Kundenwünsche, Transparenz und absolute Zuverlässigkeit als klare
Tugenden im Mittelpunkt der Unternehmensphilosophie.
Unsere Unternehmens-Philosophie
Wir gehen stets die Extrameile für unsere Kunden.
Ehrliche, offene und kompetente Beratung. Der Kunde steht im Mittelpunkt, nicht das Objekt/Produkt.
Loyalität und Ehrlichkeit unter Kollegen.
Nicht im, sondern am Unternehmen arbeiten.
Erinnere Dich daran, warum Du gestartet bist.
Weiterbildung, Entwicklung und Networking sind der Schlüssel zu langfristigem Erfolg.
Sei dankbar für das, was wir bereits gemeinsam geschaffen haben.
Wir passen uns stets den Marktgegebenheiten an und hinterfragen unsere Prozesse kontinuierlich. Verantwortungsvoller Umgang mit nachhaltigen Ressourcen.

Durchführung von digitalen Verkaufsgesprächen mit vorqualifizierten Leads

Enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem Beraterteam, um unsere Kunden über den gesamten Prozess hinweg optimal zu begleiten

hybrides Arbeiten ist für uns selbstverständlich

Title: E-Commerce Kaufmann / Online Sales & Beratung von Fotografie-Equipment (m/w/d)
Description:
UNSERE REISE
Als einer der führenden deutschen Onlineshops für Fotografie-Enthusiasten
geht FOTO HAMER immer wieder neue innovative Wege. Wir sind unverändert ein
Familienunternehmen seit dem Jahr 1910 und verpflichten wir uns der Innovation,
anstelle der Tradition. 100% Forward Thinking, 100% Persönlichkeit, 100%
Wertschätzung, 0% Haben-wir-immer-schon-so-gemacht.
Unser Standbein ist und bleibt der E-Commerce, doch das reicht uns nicht. Wir
erweitern unseren Horizont um inspirierende neue Geschäftsbereiche.
Nachdem wir zuletzt mit GEARFLIX erfolgreich die Sharing-Economy in die
Fotoszene integriert haben, widmen wir uns nun mit der Review-Plattform ZIELFOTO (Kooperation mit YouTuber Stephan Wiesner) einer
einzigartigen und zukunftsweisenden Herausforderung und entwickeln im
Verbund mit kraftvollen Partnern DIE Social-Commerce-Plattform der
Foto-Szene.
ZIELFOTO
begleitet zukünftig jeden, der die Fotografie liebt. Vielen ist ZIELFOTO als Magazin ein Begriff, wir schaffen nun eine ganze Online-Welt für Fotografie. Hier teilen wir nicht nur unsere Emotionen, sondern auch tägliche News, handfeste
Meinungen und faire Reviews zu allem, was die Fotografie bewegt.
Egal ob der Kunde sich gerade über die neuesten Foto-Trends informieren will
oder auf der Suche nach einer gezielten Kaufberatung ist – wir kreieren
eine neue Destination hierfür.
DAS TEAM
Unsere Reise starten wir nicht alleine, und schon gar nicht ohne Vorsprung.
Mit dabei ist eine feine Auswahl an erfolgreichen und ambitionierten
Youtubern, Profi-Fotografen und Brand Ambassadoren.
Die beiden Teams rund um Stephan Wiesner (Youtube) und Marius Hamer (FOTO HAMER, GEARFLIX) arbeiten seit Jahren mit Freude und Erfolg zusammen. Es liegt
nun auf der Hand, den nächsten Schritt gemeinsam zu gehen und eine
Plattform für Hobbyfotografen zu schaffen, die echte Mehrwerte bietet.
Innerhalb des ZIELFOTO-Teams fokussieren sich Stephan & weitere TOP-Youtuber
um inspirierenden Content, während das FOTO HAMER-Team die Qualität
& Vielfalt der Plattform-Angebote im Auge hat. Eine erlesene Auswahl
an Gästen und Partnern bringen ihre individuellen Stärken ein, um
ZIELFOTO zum Next Big Thing der Foto-Szene zu machen.
MÖCHTEST DU UNS BEGLEITEN?
Die hier beschriebene Position bezieht sich auf eine unbefristete
Festanstellung bei FOTO HAMER und einer Mitwirkung an allen genannten E-Commerce und Social Commerce Aufgabenbereichen einschließlich Entwicklung und langfristigem Betrieb der ZIELFOTO Plattform. Gerade die Symbiose der
Tätigkeitsfelder macht den Reiz unserer Arbeit aus.
Aufgaben
Die individuelle Beratung unserer treuen Abonnenten und Kunden per E-Mail, Telefon oder Chat liegt in Deinem Interessensgebiet, die persönliche Kommunikation ist Deine Stärke.
Du berätst zum passenden Foto-Equipment, bestellst Ware bei unseren Lieferanten und koordinierst alle E-Commerce Prozesse mit unserer Warenwirtschaft.
Du informierst Dich ständig über die Neuheiten in der Fotoszene: bisher durch Onlinemedien und nun fortan in dieser Position über professionelle Schulungen.
In enger Abstimmung mit dem Service-Team stellst Du sicher, dass alle Aufträge im Sinne des Kunden ausgeführt werden.
Du arbeitest eng mit unserem Onlinemarketing Team zusammen und kennst alle aktuellen Hersteller-Aktionen, um auch in dieser Hinsicht kompetent zu beraten.
Qualifikation
E-Commerce Kaufmann / Sales Manager (m/w/d)
Du bist…
idealerweise bereits im Fotofachhandel tätig (gewesen), sei es im lokalen oder E-Commerce Verkauf. Aber auch Fotografen
ohne kaufmännische Vorerfahrung
sind schon bei uns eingestiegen und haben die E-Commerce Prozesse schnell erlernt.
immer kundenorientiert und du wirst aufgrund Deiner freundlichen und kompetenten Art geschätzt.
eine Person mit einer unternehmerischen Arbeitseinstellung, eigenständig motiviert und Du gehst verantwortungsvoll mit Freiheiten um.
ein Teamplayer mit Spaß an einem abwechslungsreichen Arbeitsumfeld mit einem agilen und weltoffenen Team.
entweder über eine Ausbildung, ein Studium oder als Autodidakt zu den Fähigkeiten gekommen, die geschilderten Aufgaben zu meistern.
Benefits
Moderner Arbeitsplatz?
Na klar, direkt im Bochumer Szeneviertel Bermuda Dreieck. Im Herzen des schönen Ruhrgebiets, das auch „Stadt der Städte“ genannt wird. Moderne Büroräume & die neueste Technik unterstützen Dich beim Arbeiten.
Altersstruktur?
Von „kurz vor Führerschein“ bis „kurz vor Rente“ ist bereits alles an Bord.
Tellerrand?
Gibt’s nicht. Du blickst nicht nur auf andere Aufgabenbereiche, Du wirst ein Teil davon. Mix & Match dieser und anderer veröffentlichten Stellen ist möglich.
Abwechslungsreich?
In jedem Fall, denn unser Gesamtteam verantwortet mehrere eigene Online-Angebote und Webseiten. Schwerpunkt dieser Optionen ist ZIELFOTO in direkter Zusammenarbeit mit dem Team Wiesner.
Fest oder Freelancer?
Für die hier genannten Stellen suchen wir vorrangig feste neue Teammitglieder in Vollzeit.
Vergütung?
Attraktives Grundgehalt plus Bonusoption.
Sonstige Benefits?
Na sicher, zum Beispiel unbeschränkter Zugang zum neuesten Foto-Equipment
Alle Stellen sind ab sofort zu besetzen und solange vakant, bis sie hier nicht mehr veröffentlicht werden.
Bitte richte Deine Bewerbung inkl. Verfügbarkeit & Gehaltsvorstellung (Anhänge bitte nur in einem einzelnen PDF-Dokument) direkt per E-Mail an Marius Hamer.
Die Bewerbung sollte idealerweise über die Plattform "Join" erfolgen.
Die Entscheidung zwischen "Du" oder "Sie" überlassen wir gerne Dir bzw. Ihnen.

Title: Team Assistant - Quick Commerce
Description:
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.
Job Description
We are on the lookout for a
Team Assistant - Quick Commerce
to join the
Management Support
team on our journey to always deliver amazing experiences.
Do you get inspired working with an outstanding support team and equally enjoy being the foundation that makes that team tick?
If the above resonates with you, we are looking forward to your application for our Team Assistant role. As a Team Assistant you will be a key part of our department, someone who brings joy and order to the workplace in equal measures and is excited about building strong working relationships with their stakeholders.
You’ll join a high performing team of assistants who are responsible for providing exceptional support across the company. Our purpose is to increase the productivity of our teams and help contribute to accomplishing their business goals as well as improving departmental culture and process efficiency. You will be the magic maker who ensures your department is functioning at its best.
Assist VPs and their teams in their day to day work by providing first-class support, including full administrative task ownership.
Organize team meetings, including team All-Hands and leadership meetings.
Organize events of all sizes, including team events, conferences and offsites.
Manage travel logistics, trip preparation & expense reporting for the stakeholders.
Manage internal team processes, projects and communications.
Take action to improve operations in order to facilitate the team's daily activities.
Qualifications
What you need to be successful:
You have gained a minimum of 3 years of work experience, in team support, or coordinator roles.
You have excellent communication skills ensuring that tact, discretion and confidentiality are at the forefront of your interactions.
You have first-class written communication skills in English.
You are customer focused, solution-oriented, with exceptional attention to detail and resilience, and have excellent organizational and multitasking skills.
You are a natural relationship builder and have impeccable stakeholder management skills.
You are a pro-active, pragmatic and personable individual who enjoys interaction with diverse groups of people.
Additional Information

Title: Client Solutions Manager (Comprehensive Retailers) - Global Business Solutions - Berlin
Description:
Responsibilities
The Client Solutions team mission is to establish and build scalable, healthy, long-term client relationships by solving direct client's and agencie's challenges through scalable, best in class campaign services. Client Solution Managers have a holistic understanding about TikTok's ad products and are humble, dynamic and open for change. You are joining a team of consultants and marketing and self service platform experts, who proactively drive the client’s growth strategy, including upsells, renewals and campaign reactivations.
In this role you will be working closely with the Brand and Agency Partnerships team to deliver a first-class service to clients. Success in this position requires a focus on client service, the ability to thrive in a dynamic work environment, and the ability to provide custom solutions for advertisers leveraging our unique ad product suite, a unique blend of technical and commercial knowledge.
- Aid the team in educating clients and agencies on product solutions and best practices, and ultimately helping to grow existing businesses, helping the team manage relationships with key Comprehensive Retailer clients and agency partners (media, creative, marketing partners)
- Analyze campaign performance data to offer clients data-driven business insights and at the same time, use those insights to improve our advertising offerings, maximise client's revenue and increase ROI and efficiency
- Conduct regular business reviews and take a consultative, long-term approach to build productive relationships with clients, in collaboration with the sales team
- Manage custom programs or sponsorships with other departments internally and lead the custom content campaigns to ensure assets are distributed and delivered on time
- Kick-off campaigns with clients and manage all timelines, assets and opportunities for optimization
- Serve as a product consultant educating clients and agencies on product solutions and best practices, and ultimately grow existing business partnership
- Work and collaborate with a diverse group of internal cross functional teams, support the team to identify, create, and implement creative ad solutions grounded on achieving measurable business results for client partners
- Investigate and work directly with international product & engineering teams to help them troubleshoot client issues during a campaign
- Build scalable processes for our growing Client Solutions Management team
- Work with the campaign execution team to ensure ad specifications and rates are accurate as well as being responsible for the reporting of and optimisation of campaigns
Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications
- Experience managing campaigns across digital platforms and ad tech product.
- Deep understanding of digital landscape and a passion for social media.
- Detail oriented, with exceptional organisational skills.
- Previous experience working across multi markets preferred but not necessary.
- High oral and written English language communication skills, medium oral and written German would be beneficial as this role will work with local stakeholders/vendors.
- Self-starter, fast learner with a start-up spirit.
Preferred Qualifications
- Experience having worked with clients in the Comprehensive Retailer or eCom industry.
- Background/experiences in performance campaigns.
- Proven success in a highly dynamic, rapidly changing environment.
About TikTok
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​
Why Join Us
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​
​
Diversity & Inclusion​
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Title: Account Marketing Specialist
Description:
At YETI, we believe that time spent outdoors matters more than ever and our gear can make that time extraordinary. When you work here, you’ll have the opportunity to create exceptional, meaningful work and problem solve with innovative team members by your side. Together, you’ll help our customers get the high-quality gear they need to make the most of their adventures. We are BUILT FOR THE WILD™.
As the Account Marketing Analyst, you’ll drive sell-through and elevate YETI’s brand presence across German wholesale channels. You’ll develop and execute tailored marketing plans for German dealers—both online and offline—ensuring seasonal campaigns and evergreen content are delivered on-brand and on time.
The aim of your role is to create valuable retail marketing stories for the YETI dealers in your region and work closely with the sales agent to align on annual account marketing plans for those. This should happen through proactive relationship management of our retail partners, external agents and internal stakeholders and in close cooperation with the European Marketing Team.
The Account Marketing Analyst is part of the European Commercial Team and reports to the Account Marketing Manager Europe
Your Responsibilities:
Build and manage strong relationships with German retail partners, in close alignment with local sales agents.
Act as the primary marketing contact for dealers in Germany.
Develop tailored account marketing plans, including in-store activations, digital presence, and overall brand representation.
Coordinate visual merchandising assets—fixtures, signage, and digital content—and oversee creative execution.
Collaborate closely with the European Account Marketing team to ensure timely delivery of marketing tools and assets.
Monitor and report on campaign performance, ROI, and execution.
Identify opportunities to expand YETI’s footprint in retail environments (e.g., branded zones, shop-in-shop concepts).
Ensure consistent brand representation across all retail touchpoints in Germany.
Partner with Key Accounts to enhance online brand visibility through elevated brand stores, newsletters, and social media.
Conduct regular store visits to strengthen relationships and uphold YETI’s visual merchandising standards.
Lead and coordinate retail events and trade shows, including staffing and asset management.
Manage the German retail seeding budget and sample order process.
Analyze competitor activity and market trends to inform strategy.
Support and evaluate marketing initiatives for effectiveness and future planning.
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field.
4+ years of experience in retail marketing or visual merchandising, ideally within premium, outdoor, or lifestyle brands.
Strong understanding of brand building and integrated marketing strategies.
Experience working in international and cross-functional environments.
Proficient in MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint).
Creative, energetic, and trend-aware.
Excellent communication and organizational skills.
Service-oriented with a proactive, hands-on approach.
Fluent in German and English; additional European languages are a plus.
Willingness to travel within Germany and occasionally across Europe.
Passion for the outdoors and alignment with YETI’s core values.
Must have the right to work in Germany.
Benefits & Perks
Click here to learn about the benefits and perks we offer at YETI.
YETI is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.
Our commitment to creating a diverse, equitable, and inclusive culture is at the center of everything we do for our employees. We embrace all applicants looking to bring their authentic selves to YETI and contribute to our mission of keeping the wild WILD. Find out more about our commitment to DE&I at yeti.com/esg.html.
All applicants for employment will be considered without regard to an individual’s race, color, sex, gender identity, gender expression, religion, age, national origin or ancestry, citizenship, physical or mental disability, medical condition, family care status, marital status, sexual orientation, genetic information, military or veteran status, or any other basis protected by federal, state or local laws.
YETI Applicant Privacy Notice
YETI welcomes and encourages applications from people with disabilities. Accommodations are available upon request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process. If you require accommodation in order to apply for a job, please contact us at accommodationrequest@yeti.com.

Title: Conversion Manager
Description:
Conversion Manager bei Drip Trading GmbH
Anforderungen
Wohnsitz:
Nur für Bewerber aus Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz
Sprache:
Deutsch - Muttersprachliches Niveau
Must-Haves:
💬 Du kannst komplexe Erkenntnisse klar kommunizieren – auf Deutsch oder Englisch
🔍 Verständnis von UX-Prinzipien (Usability, Heuristiken, Conversion-Flows)
🧪 Grundkenntnisse im Bereich A/B-Testing (Hypothesenbildung, Signifikanz, Interpretation)
🧠 Interesse oder Basisverständnis für Behavioral Science / Entscheidungspsychologie
💪 Du bist ehrgeizig, hungry, lösungsorientiert
📊 Erste Berührungspunkte mit Tools wie GA4, Hotjar, Polls oder Testing-Tools (z. B. ABlyft, Kameleoon)
🚀 Du willst schneller wachsen als 99% deiner Altersgruppe
Bonus:
Erfahrung mit A/B-Testing Tools (z. B. ABlyft, Kameleoon, Convert, VWO, etc.)
Studium in Psychologie, Wirtschaft, Data Science, o. ä.
Erfahrung im UX/UI / Skills in Figma
Track Record in Consulting, Startups oder High-Performance Umgebungen
Du warst mal selbstständig oder hast was Eigenes gebaut
Technisches Verständnis (z. B. HTML/CSS, Tagging, Analytics Setup)
Tätigkeiten
Deine Aufgaben:
Customer Strategy: Du betreust 5+ E-Commerce Brands als ihr strategischer Partner in allen CRO-Belangen.
Research & Insights: Du führst quantitative & qualitative Research-Prozesse durch (Surveys, Analytics, Session Recordings, etc.) und extrahierst echte Aha-Momente.
Roadmap Ownership: Du entwickelst datengetriebene A/B-Test-Roadmaps, die Revenue bewegen.
Teamsteuerung über Prozesse: Du bist nicht operativ im Design oder Dev – stattdessen steuerst du ein eigenes Umsetzungsteam (UX/UI, Dev, QA, Research), das du über Jira führst.
Testing & Evaluation: Du priorisierst, testest und analysierst – mit einem klaren Fokus auf Business Impact.
Client Communication: Du führst, inspirierst und challengest deine Kunden – auf Augenhöhe.
Team
Was du bekommst:
No Bullshit Hierarchien: Du arbeitest direkt mit dem CEO, kein Mittelmanagement, keine Politik.
Maximales Ownership: Du konzipierst, steuerst und verantwortest Tests von A bis Z
Radikale Transparenz: Alle KPIs, Updates, Learnings – offen einsehbar im bi-weekly All Hands.
Sportsteam Mentalität: Jeder hier spielt für’s Team. Leistung wird respektiert. Alle 90 Tage kommt das Team physisch für Workation & Deepdive zusammen.
Wachstum im Blut: Jeder bei DRIP lernt ständig – fachlich, mental, körperlich. Wir sind keine Familie. Wir sind eine Performance-Unit.
AI Infrastructure:
Wir nutzen moderne AI-Tools und Automatisierungen, um dir repetitive Tasks (z. B. Test-Auswertung, QA, Research-Prep) abzunehmen – du arbeitest hauptsächlich strategisch & kreativ.
Über das Unternehmen
Wer wir sind
DRIP ist keine Agentur im klassischen Sinne. Wir sind ein Team aus A-Playern, dass richtig Bock hat Gas zu geben. Unser Output ist ein messbarer Uplift im Umsatz unserer Kunden.
Gegründet 2019
, gebootstrapped mit eigenen E-Com Brands und Dropshipping-Stores. Mit den ersten Kunden – u.a. Snocks – entstand DRIP als spezialisierte CRO-Agentur.
Heute sind wir
55+ Mitarbeitende
, davon rund 20 aus Deutschland. Wir arbeiten remote, lean und skalieren strukturiert.
Unser Ziel:
Die größte Conversion Rate Optimierungsagentur im DACH-Raum werden.
Unsere Kunden
: Snocks, KICKZ, BLACKROLL, HOLY, HelloFresh, Elevate – und viele mehr.
Klicke auf "Bewerben" für Details zu den Benefits, dem Team und dem Bewerbungsprozess.

Title: Manager, Enterprise Sales (Product Sales Specialists)
Description:
Our Company
Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.
We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!
The opportunity
From morning to night, every interaction and experience you have with media, adverts, apps, websites, and online shopping is likely influenced by an Adobe product.
We have a fantastic opportunity for a Manager Solutions Ent. Sales to lead one of our Product Sales Specialist teams based in Munich, Hamburg or remote.
Join our high-performing Sales team driving growth in the Digital Experience space. We're looking for a dynamic leader with a strong track record in MarTech solution sales and team leadership. If you thrive on closing deals, leading from the front, and scaling impact—this is your opportunity.
What You'll Do
As a Sales Manager, you will lead and develop a team of Product Sales Specialists focused on selling enterprise-level digital experience solutions to large accounts. You’ll be responsible for driving go-to-market strategy, building pipeline in close collaboration with BDR and Marketing teams, and ensuring consistent execution through all stages of the sales cycle.
You’ll mentor your team to build strong executive relationships at the C- and VP-level, craft ROI-based value propositions, and close high-impact, transformational deals. A key part of your role is developing strategic account plans and leading the team in achieving revenue targets for new logo software sales.
You will oversee forecasting and planning, ensuring accurate and timely reporting, while partnering cross-functionally with pre-sales, professional services, and marketing to amplify our market presence. As a visible leader, you will foster a culture of high performance, continuous learning, and customer-centric growth.
What You Need To Succeed
Proven sales track record with Tier 1 and Tier 2 companies, consistently achieving or exceeding quota
Experience managing sales teams (5+ team members) or demonstrated leadership potential
Strong understanding of industry dynamics, key challenges, cost drivers, and customer needs
Familiarity with Digital Experience solutions and the broader competitive landscape is preferred
Successful track record in selling to senior decision-makers, ideally CMOs and digital transformation leaders
Proficient in applying structured sales methodologies in complex enterprise environments
Skilled in uncovering business requirements and building ROI-driven value propositions
Strong communicator with the ability to clearly articulate value in a customer-centric way
Effective cross-functional collaborator who engages the right internal stakeholders at each stage of the sales cycle
Well-connected, with the ability to build and leverage a strong network of senior industry contacts and influencers
Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law. Learn more.
Adobe aims to make Adobe.com accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call (408) 536-3015.

Title: KEY ACCOUNT MANAGER (M/W/D)
Description:
In 2001, Veepee revolutionised consumer spending by creating the concept of online sales-events, now better known as flash sales: branded products available in limited quantities, for a limited time (3 to 5 days), offered at a steep discount and with a creative and engaging presentation. In 2019, building on its European development strategy started in 2006, vente-privee changes its name to Veepee, a global brand present in 10 European countries. From being a non-specialist site dedicated to the online sale of stocks of major brands, Veepee has become a multi-specialist site with expertise in all the sectors in which it operates: Fashion, Footwear, Home, Children, Gourmet and Travel. Close collaboration with 7,000 brands allows Veepee to offer exclusive discounts compared to recommended retail prices. With 4,500 employees and millions of members worldwide, Veepee realised a net consumer sales value of EUR 3.3 billion in 2024.
📄 Job Description
As Key Account Manager at Veepee, you will ensure the best brands, the best stocks and the best prices on your portfolio
You will be pivotal in managing and expanding our strategic accounts. Your role will encompass both the acquisition of new accounts through prospection and development of existing partners. You will be the privileged contact for brands and your strong relationship skills will enable you to build powerful connections both internally and externally.
You will develop brands both on local and international markets, creating European interconnections and synergies
Your key focus areas will include understanding partners needs, driving growth, and ensuring to reach portfolio targets. You will work closely with sales analysts and other internal teams to ensure partners satisfaction and contribute to the overall success of our business
If you are passionate about building meaningful brand relationships, eager to learn in an international and dynamic company, we would love to hear from you.
🎯 MISSIONS
Prospection (New Accounts): Identify, engage, and onboard new strategic accounts, ensuring a robust and growing client portfolio
Partnership & Relationship Development (Existing Accounts): Build, maintain, and deepen relationships with existing partners to ensure sustained growth and deliver the annual budget
Deal Negotiation : Close agreements with our brand partners by negotiating the commercial and contract conditions
Market Knowledge: Maintain a keen understanding of market trends, competitor activities, and industry developments to enhance Veepee's market positioning
Sales Coordination: Guarantee the internal negotiation needed with other functions to build the best solution to maximize performances (supply chain, planning, marketing,...)
👉 MUST HAVE Skills
+5 years experience as Key Account Manager or similar role
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Marketing, or a related field
You are result-oriented and have strong analytical skill
You have a strong track record in prospection, account management and achieving sales targets
You master communication technique and you have strong interpersonal skills
You have excellent negotiation skills and perseverance to close deals and resolve conflicts with a proactive approach You are rigorous and can manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously
You are willing to learn and adapt to new challenges in a dynamic environment
You are a team player and can collaborate with different departments in an international environment
You master Google Apps and Office Pack, specially Gsheet, Slides and Excel
You possess excellent Local Language and excellent English language skills
✅ Benefits
A permanent full-time position with immediate start date
A flexible working model with the option to work from home two days a week
An attractive office in Düsseldorf's Media Harbour
The opportunity to contribute your own ideas and shape the development of the company
Your other benefits: company pension scheme, private supplementary insurance, public transport allowance, gym or sports club allowance
Coffee, tea and water are available free of charge
A team that sticks together and has fun at (and after) work
❓ TEAM
Our Sourcing Germany team has been working closely with various brands in the fashion, home, sports, shoes, accessories and many other sectors for decades
We offer a wide range of different commercial offers and are the founders of the flash sale principle
All our business managers have a wealth of experience and will support you in advancing your personal development
⚙️RECRUITMENT PROCESS
1️⃣ 15-30 minute telephone interview with our HR manager
2️⃣ 60 minute interview with hiring manager and HR manager
3️⃣ Approx. 90 minute meeting with the team and initial practical insights into the tasks
All our positions are open to people with health conditions or impairments.
We are convinced that it is up to you to define the way you work, to develop yourself and to progress. At Veepee we guarantee that you can just be yourself! For the service of diversity and inclusion, Veepee is committed to reviewing all applications received on an equal basis.
🔗company
For more information about our ecosystem : https://careers.veepee.com/en/home-page-en/
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Influencer Marketing Specialist
Description:
We are looking for a creative and results-driven
Influencer Marketing Specialist
to join our team. In this role, you will manage and grow our brand’s presence across social media platforms and develop strong collaborations with influencers to boost brand awareness, engagement, and sales.
Key Responsibilities
Influencer Marketing:
Identify, evaluate, and build relationships with relevant influencers and brand ambassadors.

Content Collaboration:

Support content creation (copywriting, visuals, short-form videos).
Qualifications
Proven experience in
influencer marketing
and
social media management
(agency or in-house).
Strong knowledge of major social platforms and influencer marketing tools.
Excellent communication and negotiation skills.
Creative mindset with an eye for trends and engaging storytelling.
Data-driven approach to measuring and improving performance.
Previous experience in production, events, or concerts is highly preferred.
English – mandatory
(excellent written and spoken).
Additional languages are considered an advantage.
Nice to Have
Experience with paid ads (Meta, TikTok) is a plus.
Basic design or video editing skills.
What We Offer
A creative, collaborative, and fast-paced work environment.
Growth opportunities within the marketing team.
Flexible working arrangements.

Title: GTM Associate (m/f/d)
Description:
TL;DR
- We’re building the healthcare workforce for tomorrow. Our AI receptionist Luna is already automating patient communication in medical practices today. As the market leader in orthodontics and with a recent major funding round under our belt, we’re now scaling into additional medical specialties — and you’ll be a key contributor to make that work. As GTM Associate, you’ll help us build a world-class GTM engine and will grow professionally along the way.
Why praxipal?
The shortage of skilled professionals is the biggest challenge in our healthcare system. Tens of thousands of positions remain unfilled each year, and demographic shifts are only making things worse. Medical practices rely on our AI receptionist Luna to reduce staff workload and keep care accessible for everyone. We’re growing at record speed and recently closed a $6.7M seed round with HV Capital — and we’re just getting started.
We are a tech-driven company that deliberately relies on a small, talent-dense team. What defines us is the speed and intensity with which we work — but just as important to us is our team spirit. That’s why we come into the office every day: to connect, learn from one another, and grow together. Cross-functional collaboration happens naturally here — in your day-to-day, you’ll work closely with Julius, Lisa and Daniel.
What We’re Looking For
First work experience in fast-paced environments, ideally combining generalist and customer-facing roles
Extraordinary drive, strong entrepreneurial mindset and a high level of self-motivation
Quick to learn and adapt to new roles, tools and automation solutions
Natural connector who proactively builds and develops relationships with customers, partners and team members
German and English at a professional level
What You’ll Do
In one sentence: You’ll help us build a world-class GTM organization, driving impact through killer demos and bold lead-gen plays.
You turn customer interest into long-lasting partnerships
You represent us at events and establish them as one of our most powerful growth engines
You create lead-gen opportunities on your own — full ownership from start to finish
You sharpen our processes and play an active role in shaping our go-to-market strategy
You use tools to help build an automated growth and sales engine
Your Benefits
Competitive salary and participation in our VSOP program
Unparalleled learning opportunities at the frontier of AI and healthcare
Work alongside a strong, motivated team with ample growth opportunities
Urban Sports Club membership
Lunch subsidy via Lunchit and daily team dinners covered by the company

Title: Influencer Relations Manager (m/f/d)
Description:
Join Audiencly GmbH, a leading influencer marketing agency specializing in the gaming industry, as an Influencer Relations Manager (m/w/d). Based in Düsseldorf, Germany, we're at the forefront of connecting top game publishers and brands with influential social media content creators on platforms like YouTube, Instagram, Twitch, and TikTok. With a team of 51-200 dedicated professionals, our mission is to become the number one agency in this dynamic field. We seek passionate individuals with a strong affinity for social media, gaming, and other trending industries to help us achieve unparalleled marketing success through creative promotions and strategic sponsorships. At Audiencly, we value accountability, creativity, diversity, and teamwork, fostering an inclusive environment where education, innovation, and personal growth are prioritized. If you are ready to make an impact and contribute to setting new trends, we look forward to welcoming you to our vibrant team.
The ideal candidate should be located in Germany (preferably in the Düsseldorf area) but we are open to receiving remote (worldwide) applications as well.
Tasks
Develop and maintain strong relationships with influencers and content creators across platforms such as YouTube, Instagram, Twitch, and TikTok.
Identify and onboard new influencer talent that aligns with our clients' brand objectives and values.
Collaborate with internal teams to design and execute creative marketing campaigns that achieve client goals.
Analyze campaign performance metrics and provide insights and recommendations for optimization.
Ensure clear communication and alignment between influencers, clients, and internal teams to facilitate successful project execution.
Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in influencer marketing or social media management.
Strong understanding of social media platforms such as YouTube, Instagram, Twitch, and TikTok.
Excellent communication and negotiation skills with the ability to establish and maintain relationships with influencers.
Proven track record of successfully executing influencer marketing campaigns and achieving measurable results.
Benefits
Benefits
Future-proof workplace in a growing industry
Flexible working in the office/remote
Freedom for creative and innovative ideas
Coaching and further training offers
Offers for mental well-being
29+ vacation days
Join Audiencly GmbH as an Influencer Relations Manager and shape the future of gaming marketing! Collaborate with top brands and creators to drive innovative campaigns across leading social platforms.

Title: Hands-on Vertrieb & Marketing (m/w/d) – Junge Weinmarke - auch Teilzeit od. Werkstudent möglich
Description:
Du liebst Wein, packst gerne an und willst direkt am Umsatz mitdrehen? Dann werde unser*e
Sales & Marketing Associate (m/w/d)
– mit klarem Fokus auf
Hunter-Sales
und
hands-on Marketing
- auch als Werkstudent oder Teilzeit möglich!
Deine Mission
Aktive Akquise & Betreuung:
Weingeschäfte, Gastronomie und Retailer telefonisch und via E-Mail ansprechen, Termine setzen, Needs qualifizieren,
Muster versenden & nachfassen
, Deals closen.
Kampagnen umsetzen:
Online-Kooperationen (z. B. Newsletter, Partner-Deals),
Flyer & POS-Material
koordinieren, Landingpages briefen, Listings optimieren.
Marketing-Aktionen planen & ausführen:
Tasting-Events, Pop-ups, Bündelaktionen, Influencer-/Creator-Koops – von Idee über Orga bis Reporting.
Pipeline & CRM:
Leads strukturieren, Forecasts pflegen,
klare Follow-ups
setzen, Win/Loss dokumentieren.
Performance & Learnings:
Einfache Auswertungen (z. B. Öffnungs-/Klickraten, Conversion), Hypothesen testen,
nächste Iteration starten
.
Team-Work:
Eng mit Ops/Logistik (z. B. Muster- und Promo-Versand) und Content zusammenarbeiten.
Was dich auszeichnet
Vertrieb-Drive:
Du hast keine Scheu vor Kaltakquise, liebst klare Ziele und bringst Deals strukturiert zum Abschluss.
Hands-on Mindset:
Du denkst nicht lange drüber – du
machst
. Du kannst Projekte eigenständig starten und über die Ziellinie bringen.
Wein- & Handelsverständnis:
Erste Erfahrung im Weinhandel/FMCG/E-Commerce oder starke Affinität – Rebsorten, Stile, Basics des Handels kennst du oder lernst sie schnell.
Kommunikation:
Starke Schreibe und Telefonpräsenz in
Deutsch
(C1+) und solide
Englisch
-Skills.
Tool-Kompetenz:
CRM (z. B. HubSpot/Pipedrive), Office/Google Workspace;
Canva
oder Basics in Gestaltung sind ein Plus.
Organisation:
Du jonglierst mehrere Leads & Aktionen parallel, priorisierst sauber und hältst Deadlines.
Mobilität:
Führerschein Klasse B ist von Vorteil (Muster & POS).
Nice to have
Erfahrung mit
Newsletter-Koops
,
Meta/Google Ads
-Basics, Event-Umsetzung, Retail-/Gastro-Netzwerk.
Grundkenntnisse in
E-Commerce
(Shop-Backends, Produkt-Feeds, Pricing/Promo-Mechaniken).
Was wir bieten
Direkter Impact:
Dein Output ist sichtbar – von gewonnenen Accounts bis zu erfolgreichen Aktionen.
Gestaltungsspielraum:
Viel Eigenverantwortung, kurze Wege, schnelle Entscheidungen.
Flexibles Setup:
Hybrid/remote innerhalb Deutschlands möglich; gelegentliche Reisen zu Partnern/Events.
Faire Konditionen:
Marktgerechtes Gehalt, Bonuskomponente nach klaren KPIs (z. B. neue Accounts, Wiederbestellungen, Kampagnenzielerreichung), Mitarbeiterrabatt auf Weine.
Rahmen
Start:
Ab sofort
Umfang:
Vollzeit (40h) – auch Zeilzeit möglich
Standort:
München, aber remote/hybrid möglich
So bewirbst du dich
Schick uns
Lebenslauf oder LinkedIn-Profil
plus 2–3 Sätze, warum du für Sales & Marketing im Wein genau richtig bist, an
bewerbung@weinereihansen.de
.
Optional: Teile kurz eine
Sales-Erfolgsgeschichte
oder eine
Marketing-Aktion
, auf die du stolz bist.

Title: Client Solutions Manager (Comprehensive Retailers) - Global Business Solutions - Munich
Description:
Responsibilities
The Client Solutions team mission is to establish and build scalable, healthy, long-term client relationships by solving direct client's and agencie's challenges through scalable, best in class campaign services. Client Solution Managers have a holistic understanding about TikTok's ad products and are humble, dynamic and open for change. You are joining a team of consultants and marketing and self service platform experts, who proactively drive the client’s growth strategy, including upsells, renewals and campaign reactivations.
In this role you will be working closely with the Brand and Agency Partnerships team to deliver a first-class service to clients. Success in this position requires a focus on client service, the ability to thrive in a dynamic work environment, and the ability to provide custom solutions for advertisers leveraging our unique ad product suite, a unique blend of technical and commercial knowledge.
- Aid the team in educating clients and agencies on product solutions and best practices, and ultimately helping to grow existing businesses, helping the team manage relationships with key Comprehensive Retailer clients and agency partners (media, creative, marketing partners)
- Analyze campaign performance data to offer clients data-driven business insights and at the same time, use those insights to improve our advertising offerings, maximise client's revenue and increase ROI and efficiency
- Conduct regular business reviews and take a consultative, long-term approach to build productive relationships with clients, in collaboration with the sales team
- Manage custom programs or sponsorships with other departments internally and lead the custom content campaigns to ensure assets are distributed and delivered on time
- Kick-off campaigns with clients and manage all timelines, assets and opportunities for optimization
- Serve as a product consultant educating clients and agencies on product solutions and best practices, and ultimately grow existing business partnership
- Work and collaborate with a diverse group of internal cross functional teams, support the team to identify, create, and implement creative ad solutions grounded on achieving measurable business results for client partners
- Investigate and work directly with international product & engineering teams to help them troubleshoot client issues during a campaign
- Build scalable processes for our growing Client Solutions Management team
- Work with the campaign execution team to ensure ad specifications and rates are accurate as well as being responsible for the reporting of and optimisation of campaigns
Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications
- Experience managing campaigns across digital platforms and ad tech product.
- Deep understanding of digital landscape and a passion for social media.
- Detail oriented, with exceptional organisational skills.
- Previous experience working across multi markets preferred but not necessary.
- High oral and written English language communication skills, medium oral and written German would be beneficial as this role will work with local stakeholders/vendors
- Self-starter, fast learner with a start-up spirit.
Preferred Qualifications
- Experience having worked with clients in the Comprehensive Retailer or eCom industry.
- Background/experiences in performance campaigns.
- Proven success in a highly dynamic, rapidly changing environment.
About TikTok
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​
Why Join Us
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​
​
Diversity & Inclusion​
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Show less
